action.reasoning: Observation: Best 21.18%, recent attempts haven't improved. Analysis: Need to focus on what works - moderate sketch aug with CLIP. Let me try: (1) partial backbone freezing with high sketch aug, (2) better TTA weighting, (3) ensemble with DINOv2. Decision: Train a model with partial freezing + high sketch aug for 10 epochs, and also train DINOv2 for ensemble.
